Field Detail

emptyDiagram

protected static java.lang.String emptyDiagram
Defines the initial XML for a new, empty diagram. Note that the diagram node is an application-level entity which contains the transaction counter (TCN) and the diagram ID. The mxGraphModel is passed to the mxGraph core classes on the client-side.

diagrams

protected static java.util.Map<java.lang.String,org.w3c.dom.Document> diagrams
